params.name: Hoxne Hoard
params.description:
On Nov 15, 1992 AD, a Hox resident failed to find a hammer, with a metal detector, he discovered a hoard of coins.
The Hoxne Hoard is named after the town of Hox. It refers to a collection of coins inadvertently discovered by a resident when he was searching for a hammer. Afterward, archaeologists dug out over ten thousand silver coins and five hundred gold coins. Some of the gold coins were over 99% gold. According to experts, these coins originated in the third century. The coins' minting, …
